title: DateCriteria
description: Schema for DateCriteria in Nuix ECC REST API

type.description:
One of `From` or `Last`.

`From` specifies absolute start/end dates.

`Last` specifies last number of days back from the current date

useGMT.description: `true` specifies GMT for time, `false` specifies local time

startDate.description: inclusive start date in the format `yyyy-mm-ddThh:mm:ss` (only used if type = `From`)

endDate.description: inclusive end date in the format `yyyy-mm-ddThh:mm:ss` (only used if type = `From`)

numDays.description: number of days back from the current date (only used if type = `Last`)

checkCreation.description: When `true`, apply date criteria to creation date

checkModification.description: When `true` apply date criteria to modification date

checkAccess.description: When `true`, apply date criteria to access date
